name: Compile Kubeflow Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout Code
      uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: '3.9'

    - name: Install Dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
        # Ensure kfp is present to run the compilation script
        pip install kfp

    - name: Compile Pipeline YAML
      run: |
        # As per your steps: first execute the python script to create the .yaml
        python throughkubeflow_mlflowloggging_withoutcache_v1.py

    - name: Upload Pipeline Artifact
      uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
      with:
        name: kubeflow-pipeline-yaml
        path: mlflow_kubeflow_pipeline.yaml
